chatintegration-userprofile-chatclientus:
Label for the profile field holding the chat client username.
$1 - message key for the client name
chatintegration-channel-label:
Label for the NotifyMe channel for a chat client.
$1 - message key for the client name
chatbot-backend-message-processing-error: Message used in backend service. This message is used when an error occurs while processing a message
chatbot-backend-message-ai-streaming-err:
Message used in backend service. This message is used when an error occurs while streaming a response from the AI backend
$1 - error message
chatbot-backend-message-ai-response-erro:
Message used in backend service. This message is used when an error occurs while receiving a response from the AI backend
$1 - error message
chatbot-backend-message-ai-no-auth: Message used in backend service. This message is used when the AI backend is not authenticated
chatbot-backend-no-search-results: Message used in backend service. This message is used when no search results are found
chatbot-backend-search-results-header: Message used in backend service. This message is used as a header for the search results
pref-chatintegration-msteams-url: Label for the MS Teams URL preference field
pref-chatintegration-slack-url: Label for the Slack URL preference field
pref-chatintegration-rocketchat-url: Label for the Rocket.Chat URL preference field
pref-chatintegration-zoom-url: Label for the Zoom URL preference field
pref-chatintegration-googlemeet-url: Label for the Google Meet URL preference field
pref-chatintegration-matrix-url: Label for the Matrix URL preference field
chatintegration-msteams-droplet-name: Name of the MS Teams chat droplet
chatintegration-msteams-droplet-desc: Description of the MS Teams chat droplet
chatintegration-slack-droplet-name: Name of the Slack chat droplet
chatintegration-slack-droplet-desc: Description of the Slack chat droplet
chatintegration-rocketchat-droplet-name: Name of the Rocket.Chat chat droplet
chatintegration-rocketchat-droplet-desc: Description of the Rocket.Chat chat droplet
chatintegration-zoom-droplet-name: Name of the Zoom chat droplet
chatintegration-zoom-droplet-desc: Description of the Zoom chat droplet
chatintegration-googlemeet-droplet-name: Name of the Google Meet chat droplet
chatintegration-googlemeet-droplet-desc: Description of the Google Meet chat droplet
chatintegration-matrix-droplet-name: Name of the Matrix chat droplet
chatintegration-matrix-droplet-desc: Description of the Matrix chat droplet
chatintegration-inspector-msteams-title: Title for the MS Teams chat droplet in VisualEditor
chatintegration-inspector-msteams-descri: Description for the MS Teams chat droplet in VisualEditor
chatintegration-inspector-slack-title: Title for the Slack chat droplet in VisualEditor
chatintegration-inspector-slack-descript: Description for the Slack chat droplet in VisualEditor
chatintegration-inspector-rocketchat-tit: Title for the Rocket.Chat chat droplet in VisualEditor
chatintegration-inspector-rocketchat-des: Description for the Rocket.Chat chat droplet in VisualEditor
chatintegration-inspector-zoom-title: Title for the Zoom chat droplet in VisualEditor
chatintegration-inspector-zoom-descripti: Description for the Zoom chat droplet in VisualEditor
chatintegration-inspector-googlemeet-tit: Title for the Google Meet chat droplet in VisualEditor
chatintegration-inspector-googlemeet-des: Description for the Google Meet chat droplet in VisualEditor
chatintegration-inspector-matrix-title: Title for the Matrix chat droplet in VisualEditor
chatintegration-inspector-matrix-descrip: Description for the Matrix chat droplet in VisualEditor
chatintegration-tag-attr-url-label: Label for the url attribute of the chat link droplet
chatintegration-tag-attr-url-help: Help text for the chat link droplet channel attribute. This is the url to link to.
chatintegration-tag-attr-label-label: Label for the label attribute of the chat link droplet
chatintegration-tag-attr-label-help: Help text for the chat link droplet label attribute.
chatintegration-tag-attr-icon-size-label: Label for the icon size attribute of the chat link droplet
chatintegration-tag-attr-icon-size-help: Help text for the chat link droplet icon size attribute. This is the size of the icon.
chatintegration-tag-attr-show-icon-label: Label for the show icon attribute of the chat link droplet
chatintegration-tag-attr-show-icon-help: Help text for the chat link droplet show icon attribute. If checked, the icon will be displayed.
chatintegration-tag-attr-show-in-title-l: Label for the show in title attribute of the chat link droplet
chatintegration-tag-attr-show-in-title-h: Help text for the chat link droplet show in title attribute. If checked, the chat link will be shown in the title of the page.
chatintegration-sidebar-share-sharebymst: Message shown in the sidebar share button for MS Teams
Title for the sidebar share button for MS Teams
pref-chatintegration-sidebar-share-via-c: Preference label for showing the MS Teams share button in the sidebar
Help text for the preference to show the MS Teams share button in the sidebar. If enabled, the share via Microsoft Teams action will be shown in the sidebar.
chatbot-backend-slack-help-message: Help message for Slack integration. Shown when no valid handler can be found for user's query
chatbot-backend-auth-error-invalid: Error message shown when authentication to the AI backend fails due to invalid credentials
chatbot-backend-message-ai-processing: Message shown to the user while the backend is processing the request
chatbot-backend-message-ai-sources-heade: Header for the sources section of the AI response
